title: Bunny Girl Senpai Totem
description: Replaces the Totem of Undying with an Anime Bunny Girl Senpai Totem
body:
Overview:

A simple resource pack that replaces the Totem of Undying with a Bunny Girl Senpai Totem (Mai Sakurajima san) from Rascal Does Not Dream of Bunny Girl Senpai.
